pages.text: $(thing)Sandwiches$() are a meal allowing the combination of two $(thing)$(n)$(t:Bread, Flat Bread, or Bread Slice)Bread$() items and three $(n)$(thing)$(t:tfc:#usable_in_sandwich)Sandwich Ingredients$().$(br2)Sandwich ingredients may not be rotten, but once the sandwich is created, it is considered fresh, and decays like it is new.

pages.title: Sandwich
pages.text: Sandwiches are dynamic meal items. The ingrediants used will determine the $(l:tfc:cooking/food_and_water#nutrients)Nutrients$() it contains.$(br2)$(t:§70.8§r§l∑§r§7Ingredients §r+ §70.5§r§l∑§r§7Bread§r)To calculate the nutritional value; take the sum of each ingredients nutrition and multiply by 0.8 except the bread which is multiplied by 0.5$()

pages.title: Jam Sandwich
pages.text: Jam Sandwiches are also dynamic meal items that use the same calculation as regular sandwiches.$(br)Crafting a jam sandwich will leave an empty jar behind.
